creator: marino@FreeBSD.org
text:
first, great job on providing the log.

I'll move this to patch-ready but the changes in the port bother me a bit.  I don't know why the pkg-plist is creating symlinks instead of this being doing in a post-install target. 

If it was done in post install, we wouldn't need twice as many lines and they wouldn't be the ugly "@exec", "@unexec" type.  If I understand what's going on here...

Maybe you can think about it while waiting for somebody to pick this up out of patch-ready pool (which is quite large at the moment)
